expo.name: MS-RM Owner
expo.description: MS-RM Owner — Restaurant management dashboard for owners. Track sales, manage inventory, monitor staff, and run your restaurant business from anywhere.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MS-RM needs camera access to scan barcodes and capture product images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MS-RM needs photo library access to upload product and menu images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MS-RM uses your location to identify your outlet and provide location-based insights.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to securely sign in to MS-RM.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MS-RM to use the camera to scan table QR codes.

_notes.sentryDsn: Leave empty to disable Sentry. Set the real DSN here (or via EXPO_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN env) to enable crash reporting. A value containing 'placeholder' is treated as unset.
_notes.fcmGoogleServices: Android push (FCM): drop google-services.json at mobile/google-services.json and reference it via android.googleServicesFile before building. No file is committed here yet.
_notes.apnsPushKey: iOS push (APNs): configure the .p8 push key / credentials in EAS (eas credentials) — not stored in the repo. Requires an Apple Developer account.
